steps.title: Use the historical time frame
steps.content: The passage describes the Akkadian Empire in a completed historical period. The surrounding verbs, including was, reigned, and received, are in the past tense.

steps.title: Keep tense consistent
steps.content: A uses present tense, C uses future tense, and D uses present progressive tense. The matching verb is simple past, matching the historical time frame and surrounding verbs. The answer is B.
